message:
fix(raptorq/gf256): replace silent fallback with explicit panic in profile_pack_metadata and add catalog coverage test

profile_pack_metadata() previously fell back to GF256_PROFILE_PACK_CATALOG[0]
when a profile pack ID was missing from the catalog. This silently returned
the wrong metadata for an unknown profile, which could produce incorrect
SIMD dispatch decisions. Now panics with a descriptive message naming the
missing profile pack ID.

Also adds profile_pack_catalog_covers_every_known_profile_id_exactly_once()
test that verifies:
- The catalog has exactly one entry per known Gf256ProfilePackId variant
- Every known variant resolves via profile_pack_metadata() to its own entry
- No duplicates or missing entries exist

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
